title: Monitor wallet balance

title: Add notifications for when an agent starts and finishes work
Set up treasury agent wallet
description:
✅ Done:
- Identity file created for Baron agent
- Wallet addresses configured
- Scout deployed to research best DeFi tooling (results incoming)
- MEMORY.md updated with wallet addresses

title: Add activity feed so we can see all that gets shipped /done and by what agent.
description: ✅ Activity feed built and deployed — /activity timeline page, auto-logging on task moves, dashboard strip, sidebar nav

title: Fix task ID chain through agent activation
description: ✅ Updated activate endpoint to pass Task ID + completion curl commands directly in the agent brief so agents can self-update the Kanban.

title: Set up Scout Signal Watch cron
description: ✅ Daily 1pm ET cron — scans last 24h for high-signal news in your tracked topics. Only pings you if genuinely notable.

title: Set up Baron daily treasury report cron
description: ✅ Daily 9am ET cron — checks wallet balances, SOL/USDC prices, sends morning treasury summary to Telegram.

title: Add agent CRUD — edit, delete, create on agents page
description: ✅ Agent CRUD built — edit, delete, create with persistent storage

title: Build Settings page — configure Agent OS
description: ✅ Settings page built — agent budgets, cron management, service status, notification toggles

title: Set up Deal Flow agent — identity + partnership monitoring cron
description: ✅ DEAL_FLOW.md created, daily 8am weekday cron live — first digest ran this morning with 3 solid signals

title: Build Inbox widget — surface Gmail on dashboard
description: ✅ Inbox widget on dashboard — surfaces unread Gmail, filters noise, auto-refreshes

title: Wire /chat page to OpenClaw — talk to agents from Mission Control
description: ✅ Chat page wired to OpenClaw — talk to Vic and agents directly from Mission Control

title: Build Docs page — living knowledge base
description: ✅ Docs page — living knowledge base with Scout reports, agent docs, memory

title: Goal → Task linking — connect goals to tasks
description: Add goal selector when creating/editing tasks. Dashboard shows goal progress based on task completion. Goals page shows linked tasks.

title: Main Dashboard needs a facelift/revamp. Some of the stuff isnt dynamic and some of it is redundant.
description: ✅ Dashboard revamped — dynamic greeting, cleaner layout, inbox+activity side by side, intel+goals combined strip

title: Build setup wizard — /setup onboarding flow
Add /os landing page to Shipyard — Shipyard OS product page
Diagnose cost tracker discrepancy
description: Investigated why mission control costs page was showing $0.55 vs $100+ actual Anthropic bill. Root cause: reading wrong session file, missing sub-agents.

title: Rebuild costs page with Anthropic Admin API
description: Replaced local session file parsing with real Anthropic Admin API. Daily spend chart, real costs, cache stats, API Keys step in setup wizard.

title: Fix pagination bug in costs API
description: Corrected response schema mismatch (nested results[], page= param, uncached_input_tokens field names).

title: Security audit + OpenClaw update
description: Ran full security audit. Firewall was off (flagged), updated OpenClaw to 2026.3.2. No secrets in git.

title: Update README for localhost-first model
description: Rewrote README to reflect setup wizard, remove Vercel deploy instructions, correct feature list.

title: Token usage dashboard with heatmap
description: Building deep usage analytics: hourly heatmap, stacked daily bars, cache efficiency meters, model breakdown with costs.
